creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad The ULTIMATE hack you need to get half price food in London! 🍽️

Use the @firsttableuk app to book a table at hundreds of incredible restaurants like these across the city and you’ll automatically get 50% off your food bill and use our code EXPLORING to get free booking credit when you sign up too!

We checked out:
✨ @richouxrestaurants Langham Place for some stunning French food
✨ @nessasoho for some incredible, seasonal dishes
✨ @vantralondon for some nourishing, flavourful vegan dishes!

It’s £4-£8 to book a table, for between 2-4 people, and your food will automatically all be half price (drinks are full priced).

Have you tried the app yet? 

#firsttable #londonhack

transcription.text: The next time you're out and about in London this is the hack you need which will let you eat out for half price at some of the most incredible restaurants in the city. Let me show you exactly how it works by taking you to three different restaurants. First up we're going to Langham Place to the beautiful French restaurant Richoux and all of the food you see here was half price and that's because we booked an off-peak table here on the First Table app. You pay between £4 to £8 to book a table and then you automatically get 50% off your food bill with drinks being full price. It really is as simple as that. So now let's go to Soho to Nessa. This is a restaurant I've had on my list for ages and because we booked it on First Table we got all of the food for half price and guys that risotto and ravioli were both so so good. Finally we've got a fully vegan place called Vantra right by Chinatown. They focus on wholesome nutritional food that's still full of flavour and they've got such a diverse menu and again all of the food was half price because we booked them through First Table so definitely check out this app. Use our code EXPLORING to get £3 of free booking credit. It will change the way you eat out in London.
